_meta: 「소금장수」 등장인물 레지스트리. 그림체=채널 config/style.json. build.py가 씬 cast의 인물만 골라 turnaround를 ref로 첨부하고 lock 문장을 visual_desc의 {id}에 치환한다.

_schema.flat: 단일 상태 인물: {name, type, physical, negatives, lock, turnaround, anchorProp?}. cast는 "id"로 참조.
_schema.variant: 시간/상태 변주 인물: {name, type, default_variant, variants:{<v>:{physical, lock, turnaround, negatives?}}}. cast는 "id:variant"로 참조.

deoksam.name: 덕삼

physical.build: average lean-sturdy weathered laborer ~170cm, NOT old, NOT a boy, NOT burly, NOT fat
physical.hair: short topknot (sangtu) with a simple worn headband
physical.uniqueFeatures: kind plain weathered sun-darkened face, worn coarse undyed hemp commoner hanbok, straw sandals

deoksam.anchorProp: wooden A-frame back-carrier (jige) — his signature tool, appears when traveling/peddling
deoksam.lock: the kind slow-witted salt peddler Deoksam (an adult man in his late 30s, average lean-sturdy weathered build ~170cm, short topknot with a worn headband, gentle honest sun-darkened face, worn coarse undyed hemp commoner hanbok, straw sandals)

bokdong.name: 복동
bokdong.anchorProp: a small worn cloth pouch tied at his waist (holds his late grandfather's silver ring) — appears in both states

physical.build: starving skeletal emaciated tiny frail ~130cm, NOT an adult, NOT healthy, NOT plump
physical.uniqueFeatures: sunken hollow cheeks, cracked dry lips, ashen skin, filthy ragged tattered clothes, a small worn cloth pouch at the waist

gaunt.lock: the starving orphan boy Bokdong, near death (about 11 years old, skeletal emaciated tiny frail ~130cm, matted dirty hair, sunken hollow cheeks and weak half-closed eyes, cracked lips, filthy ragged tattered clothes, a small worn cloth pouch at his waist)

physical.build: small thin but recovered ~135cm, NOT an adult, NOT a teenager, NOT plump
physical.eyes: bright earnest serious eyes, wise beyond his years
physical.uniqueFeatures: small round-cheeked recovered face, patched but clean coarse commoner clothes, a small worn cloth pouch at the waist

healthy.lock: the orphan boy Bokdong, recovered (about 11 years old, small thin ~135cm, short tidy black hair, bright earnest eyes wise beyond his years, patched but clean coarse commoner clothes, a small worn cloth pouch at his waist)

bakhaengsu.name: 박행수

physical.build: large burly imposing tall ~180cm broad-shouldered well-fed, NOT thin, NOT a commoner, NOT frail
physical.hair: neat topknot under a black horsehair hat (gat)
physical.eyes: sharp calculating narrow eyes with a false friendly smile
physical.uniqueFeatures: prosperous groomed merchant, fine dark-toned durumagi overcoat, black gat

bakhaengsu.lock: the greedy merchant boss Bak the guild-head (a large burly imposing man in his late 40s ~180cm broad-shouldered and well-fed, neat topknot under a black horsehair gat hat, sharp calculating eyes with a false smile, fine well-off dark durumagi overcoat)

mother.name: 덕삼 어머니

physical.build: small stooped frail ~150cm, NOT tall, NOT young, NOT middle-aged
physical.hair: thin gray hair in a low bun
physical.uniqueFeatures: deeply wrinkled gentle face, worn pale faded hanbok

mother.lock: the frail elderly mother (a small stooped ~150cm woman in her 70s, thin gray hair in a low bun, kind deeply wrinkled tired face, worn pale faded hanbok)

sato.name: 사또

physical.build: dignified moderate build ~172cm, upright authoritative bearing, NOT frail, NOT a commoner
physical.hair: topknot under a black winged official's hat (samo)
physical.uniqueFeatures: Joseon county magistrate, blue-green official dallyeong robe with a rank badge, black samo hat

sato.lock: the county magistrate Sato (a dignified adult man in his 50s ~172cm with upright bearing, wearing a Joseon official's blue-green dallyeong robe with a rank badge and a black winged samo hat, fair discerning face)
